//: Coverage scope. Excludes the integration surface that is intentionally NOT unit-tested per CLAUDE.md — process spawning, MITM/network IO, the inspector HTTP server, toolchain installers, and the Playwright fixture lifecycle (all need a real device/network, and are exercised by the manual scaffold/emulator workflows instead). Pure-logic and fake-driver-drivable modules stay counted. excludeAfterRemap:true because coverage is remapped through source maps (dist -> src), so these globs match the original src paths.
